reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, exactamente son las 03:20 del día miércoles 18 d enero, estoy d pasada x Salta la Linda y salí a tomar una cerveza, estaba a punto d reventar mi vejiga y el playero d turno no dudó en ofrecerme el baño, repito, miércoles 18 d enero 2023 siendo las 03:20

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it's exactly 3:20 AM on Wednesday, January 18th. I'm passing through Salta la Linda and went out for a beer. I was about to burst my bladder and the attendant on duty didn't hesitate to offer me the restroom. I repeat, Wednesday, January 18th, 2023 at 3:20 AM.
